heading: Why trust this LA safety guide
intro: This guide is built from on-the-ground knowledge of Los Angeles neighborhoods — which areas are genuinely safe, which are overstated, and what tourists actually experience.

items.title: Neighborhood-specific, not city-wide averages
items.text: LA crime stats are meaningless without neighborhood context. This guide breaks down safety block by block — where you can walk alone at night and where you cannot.

items.title: Focused on tourist-relevant risks
items.text: Car break-ins, parking structure awareness, and a few avoidable neighborhoods are the real tourist risks in LA — not the sensational stories. This guide addresses what actually affects visitors.

items.title: No scare tactics
items.text: LA is safe for tourists in the major visitor areas. This guide gives you confidence to explore without unnecessary anxiety, while being honest about where awareness matters.

items.title: Up to date for 2026
items.text: Neighborhood safety in LA changes — DTLA has improved, some areas have not. This guide reflects the current reality, not outdated impressions.

footer: If you want an honest, current, neighborhood-specific safety guide to Los Angeles, this was built for you.
